title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Huawei's announced Tau Scaling Law as a competitive response in the China-USA semiconductor race. The analysis covers lithography techniques (EUV and DUV), packaging strategies, and logic folding innovations driving the industry forward.
